results.name: V1 recovery: 3 fails then 4th success → emits + returns stream
V2 recovery: max_attempts exhausted → recovery_failed + returns None
V3 hotplug: device add then remove → 2x device_change emits
V4 hotplug OFF: start() returns False, no thread, no emits
V5 TTS LRU ON: same key twice → 2nd is cache hit
V6 TTS LRU ON: distinct keys → all miss
V7 TTS LRU ON, SIZE=2: 3rd insert evicts oldest
V8 TTS LRU OFF: same key twice → both call underlying (no cache)
V9 recovery OFF: exception raises through, no retry
V10 default OFF: no emits, no threads, baseline equivalent
